response:
To pause your subscription, you must have an active subscription that started at least 30 days ago and have a monthly subscription for either the Individual Monthly - Basic or Interview Monthly plan. If you meet these conditions, you can pause your subscription by following these steps: 

Access Subscription Settings by clicking on the profile icon in the top-right corner of the page and selecting Settings from the dropdown menu, then navigate to the Billing section under Subscription.
Initiate Pause Subscription by clicking the Cancel Plan button, which will display a prompt about the new Pause Subscription feature.
Select the desired pause duration, with a minimum of 1 month and a maximum of 12 months.

If you are unsure about your eligibility or have questions about the pause subscription process, I recommend contacting the support team directly for assistance.
justification: Responded based on corpus sources: 5157311476-pause-subscription.md, 5179178131-zapier-hackerrank-integration-interview-user-guide.md. Classified as product_issue under billing.

response:
To update the name on your certificate, you can follow these steps: 
Open your certificate page.
In the Full Name field, enter the name you want to display.
Click Regenerate Certificate.
In the confirmation dialog, click Update Name.
The platform updates your certificate with the new name. Please note that you can only update the name on your certificate once per account, and the change applies to all your certificates.

response:
To stop Claude from crawling your website, you can add the following to your robots.txt file in your top-level directory: 

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

This will prevent Claude's crawler from accessing your website. Please note that you need to do this for every subdomain you wish to opt out from. If you have further questions or concerns, you can reach out to claudebot@anthropic.com.

response:
To set up a Claude LTI key for your students, you can follow the steps outlined in the documentation. First, you need to create a Claude LTI developer key in Canvas. To do this, sign in to Canvas as an administrator and navigate to Admin -> Developer Keys. Click "+ Developer Key" then "+ LTI Key" and enter the required information, including Key Name, Description, Redirect URIs, Title, Target Link URI, and OpenID Connect Initiation Url. 

After creating the developer key, you can install the Claude LTI as an app in Canvas. Go to Admin -> Settings -> Apps, click "View App Configurations" then select "+ App", and select "By Client ID" as the configuration type. Input the Client ID generated for your developer key and click "Install". 

For more detailed instructions, you can refer to the documentation on setting up the Claude LTI in Canvas by Instructure. If you have any further questions or need assistance with the setup process, I recommend contacting the support team directly.
justification: Responded based on corpus sources: 11725453-set-up-the-claude-lti-in-canvas-by-instructure.md, 12386420-claude-code-faq.md, 13124001-managing-your-active-sessions.md. Classified as feature_request under api_integration.

response: According to the Visa rules, in the US Virgin Islands, a merchant is allowed to require a minimum transaction amount of $10 for credit card transactions. This is an exception to the general rule that merchants are not permitted to establish a minimum or maximum amount for Visa transactions. If you have concerns about this, you can report the issue using the online form provided by Visa.
